assets.name: Cursor
assets.description: Cursor is an AI-first code editor built as a fork of VS Code, featuring deep LLM integration with multi-file context awareness, natural language editing, and a built-in chat interface that can read, write, and refactor entire codebases. It supports bring-your-own-key workflows and integrates with leading models including Claude, GPT-4, and Cursor's own fine-tuned models.

assets.name: GitHub Copilot
assets.description: GitHub Copilot is an AI pair programmer that provides real-time code suggestions directly inside VS Code, JetBrains IDEs, Neovim, and other editors. Powered primarily by OpenAI's Codex and GPT-4 family, it offers multi-line completions, docstring generation, test scaffolding, and a chat interface for in-editor Q&A and code explanation.

assets.name: Windsurf
assets.description: Windsurf (formerly Codeium) is an AI-powered IDE and editor extension that provides agentic coding capabilities through its Cascade feature, enabling multi-step autonomous code edits across large projects. It offers deep codebase awareness, inline completions, and a conversational interface that can plan and execute complex refactoring tasks.

assets.name: Claude Code
assets.description: Claude Code is Anthropic's agentic coding CLI that operates directly in the terminal, giving Claude full access to the filesystem, shell, and git. It can autonomously read, write, and execute code across entire repositories, run tests, create commits, and coordinate multi-step development workflows using hooks and custom agents.

assets.name: Codex CLI
assets.description: Codex CLI is OpenAI's open-source terminal-based coding agent that brings GPT-4o and o-series models into the command line. It can read files, execute shell commands, write and patch code, and handle multi-turn tasks within a sandboxed environment, supporting configurable trust levels for file and shell access.

assets.name: Cody
assets.description: Cody is Sourcegraph's AI coding assistant that leverages enterprise-grade codebase intelligence to provide contextually accurate completions and chat. It indexes entire large mono-repos using Sourcegraph's code graph and supports multiple LLM backends, making it particularly strong for navigating and editing sprawling enterprise codebases.

assets.name: Zed
assets.description: Zed is a high-performance, open-source code editor written in Rust that features native AI integration with inline completions and an AI panel powered by Claude and other models. Its collaborative editing and GPU-accelerated rendering make it exceptionally fast, while its MCP support enables extensible agentic workflows.

assets.name: Supermaven
assets.description: Supermaven is an ultra-fast AI code completion tool that leverages a proprietary 1M-token context window to provide whole-file aware suggestions with industry-leading latency. It integrates as a plugin into VS Code and JetBrains IDEs and is designed for developers who prioritize completion speed and large-context accuracy.

assets.name: Amazon Q Developer
assets.description: Amazon Q Developer is AWS's AI coding assistant integrated into VS Code, JetBrains, and the AWS Console. It provides code completions, security vulnerability scanning, automated code transformation for language upgrades, and deep AWS service knowledge, making it particularly effective for cloud-native and AWS-centric development.

assets.name: Tabnine
assets.description: Tabnine is an AI code completion platform aimed at enterprise teams, offering both cloud-hosted and fully air-gapped on-premise deployment. It trains on a team's own codebase to produce organization-specific completions, emphasizes code privacy through zero-retention data policies, and integrates with all major IDEs.

assets.name: Continue
assets.description: Continue is an open-source AI coding assistant extension for VS Code and JetBrains that lets developers connect any LLM — local or cloud — to a rich IDE experience including chat, inline edits, and codebase indexing. Its bring-your-own-model flexibility and active open-source community make it highly customizable for any team's stack.

assets.name: Aider
assets.description: Aider is an open-source AI pair programming CLI that connects to your local git repository and works with any OpenAI-compatible or Anthropic model to make code changes, write tests, and commit results. Its repository-map feature intelligently selects relevant files for context, enabling precise edits across multi-file projects.

assets.name: v0
assets.description: v0 is Vercel's generative UI tool that converts natural language prompts into production-ready React and Next.js components using shadcn/ui and Tailwind CSS. It provides an interactive chat interface for iterative refinement, supports live preview, and generates code that can be copied directly into any Next.js project.

assets.name: Bolt.new
assets.description: Bolt.new is StackBlitz's AI-powered full-stack app builder that runs an entire development environment in the browser using WebContainers. It enables one-prompt generation of complete applications with npm packages, a terminal, and a file editor — all without any local setup — and supports direct deployment to Netlify and other platforms.

assets.name: Lovable
assets.description: Lovable is an AI software engineer platform that generates full-stack web applications from natural language descriptions, producing clean React frontends backed by Supabase for database and auth. It supports iterative refinement through chat, GitHub sync for developer handoff, and one-click deployment to custom domains.

assets.name: Replit
assets.description: Replit is a cloud-based IDE and app-generation platform that combines an AI agent (Replit Agent) with a full development environment supporting 50+ languages. The agent can build, debug, and deploy applications from natural language prompts within an always-on cloud workspace, making it ideal for rapid prototyping and education.

assets.name: Claude Artifacts
assets.description: Claude Artifacts is Anthropic's built-in sandbox within Claude.ai that renders HTML, SVG, React components, and other code generated by Claude in a live preview panel. It enables rapid prototyping of UI components, data visualizations, and interactive tools without leaving the chat interface, with one-click publishing to share outputs.

assets.name: GitHub Copilot Workspace
assets.description: GitHub Copilot Workspace is a task-centric development environment that translates GitHub Issues and natural language goals into full implementation plans, edits across multiple files, and runnable pull requests. It enables developers to go from problem statement to proposed code changes entirely within the GitHub ecosystem.

assets.name: Devin
assets.description: Devin is the world's first fully autonomous AI software engineer, developed by Cognition. It operates in a sandboxed environment with its own shell, browser, and code editor to independently plan, implement, debug, and deploy software from high-level specifications, handling long-horizon engineering tasks with minimal human intervention.

assets.name: GPT Engineer
assets.description: GPT Engineer (now Gptengineer.app) is an open-source and cloud-hosted tool that generates entire codebases from a single natural language specification. It clarifies requirements through a conversational loop, then produces all necessary files and folder structures, targeting rapid MVP creation with minimal setup overhead.

assets.name: Vercel AI SDK
assets.description: The Vercel AI SDK is a TypeScript library that provides unified streaming primitives and React/Svelte/Vue hooks for building AI-powered applications. It abstracts over multiple LLM providers with a consistent API, supports streaming text and structured outputs, and integrates tool-calling patterns needed for building production-grade AI UIs.

assets.name: Marblism
assets.description: Marblism is an AI SaaS boilerplate generator that produces complete, production-ready Next.js applications with authentication, database schema, API routes, and styled UI components from a text prompt. It outputs clean, human-editable code rather than proprietary abstractions, making it suited for teams wanting a fast production starting point.

assets.name: OpenRouter
assets.description: OpenRouter is a unified LLM API gateway that provides a single OpenAI-compatible endpoint routing to 200+ models from every major provider. It offers automatic fallback, model price comparison, spending controls, and a public leaderboard, making it the de facto hub for developers who need multi-model access without managing multiple API keys.

assets.name: LiteLLM
assets.description: LiteLLM is an open-source Python library and proxy server that translates calls to 100+ LLM providers into a unified OpenAI-compatible format. Its proxy server adds enterprise features including virtual API keys, per-model rate limiting, cost tracking, and team-level spend budgets, making it a popular self-hosted gateway for AI teams.

assets.name: Portkey
assets.description: Portkey is an AI gateway and observability platform that adds a production reliability layer on top of LLM APIs, providing automatic retries, semantic caching, request tracing, prompt versioning, and A/B testing. Its single-line integration supports 200+ models and is designed for teams running LLMs at production scale.

assets.name: Helicone
assets.description: Helicone is an open-source LLM observability proxy that sits in front of any OpenAI-compatible API to provide real-time cost tracking, latency monitoring, request logging, prompt versioning, and user-level analytics. Its zero-latency architecture adds minimal overhead while capturing full request-response traces for debugging and optimization.

assets.name: Martian
assets.description: Martian is an intelligent LLM router that automatically selects the best model for each query based on complexity, cost constraints, and performance requirements. It learns from historical request patterns to optimize the cost-quality tradeoff dynamically, routing simple queries to cheaper models and complex ones to frontier models.

assets.name: Unify
assets.description: Unify is an LLM router and benchmarking platform that continuously benchmarks 100+ model-provider combinations and routes each request to the optimal endpoint based on configurable quality, cost, and latency tradeoffs. Developers specify optimization targets in a query string and Unify dynamically selects the best live endpoint.

assets.name: Cloudflare AI Gateway
assets.description: Cloudflare AI Gateway is a globally distributed proxy for LLM API traffic that provides caching, rate limiting, analytics, and cost controls with zero-latency overhead by running on Cloudflare's edge network. It supports Workers AI, OpenAI, Anthropic, Google Vertex, and more through a single URL substitution.

assets.name: RelayPlane
assets.description: RelayPlane is a managed LLM gateway that provides unified access to multiple AI providers with features including request routing, fallbacks, cost budgets, key management, and team-level access controls. It is designed for organizations that need a managed, policy-driven alternative to self-hosted proxies like LiteLLM.

assets.name: AWS Bedrock
assets.description: AWS Bedrock is a fully managed service that provides API access to foundation models from Anthropic, Meta, Mistral, Cohere, Amazon, and others through a unified AWS SDK interface. It includes Bedrock Agents for orchestration, Knowledge Bases for RAG, Guardrails for safety, and full VPC/IAM integration for enterprise-grade deployments.

assets.name: Azure AI Gateway
assets.description: Azure AI Gateway, built on Azure API Management, provides an enterprise-grade proxy for Azure OpenAI and other AI endpoints with token rate limiting, semantic caching, backend load balancing across OpenAI deployments, usage analytics, and full Azure RBAC and private networking support.

assets.name: Clerk
assets.description: Clerk is a complete authentication and user management platform that provides pre-built UI components, APIs, and backend SDKs for sign-up, sign-in, MFA, SSO, and organizations. It handles the full user lifecycle with a hosted dashboard, webhooks for user events, and seamless integration with Next.js, Remix, and other modern frameworks.

assets.name: Auth0
assets.description: Auth0 is an enterprise identity platform by Okta offering universal login, OAuth 2.0, OIDC, SAML, and LDAP support for web, mobile, and API applications. It features an extensive rule and action pipeline for customizing auth flows, a rich management API, anomaly detection, and compliance tooling for SOC 2, HIPAA, and GDPR.

assets.name: WorkOS
assets.description: WorkOS is an enterprise auth API platform that makes it easy to add SSO (SAML, OIDC), Directory Sync (SCIM), and Admin Portal features to any SaaS app. It is designed specifically for B2B SaaS teams targeting enterprise customers, providing the compliance-ready authentication primitives that enterprise procurement requires.

assets.name: Supabase Auth
assets.description: Supabase Auth is a fully open-source authentication service built on GoTrue that provides email/password, magic links, OAuth social providers, and phone OTP authentication tightly integrated with Supabase's PostgreSQL database and Row Level Security policies for seamless data authorization.

assets.name: Firebase Auth
assets.description: Firebase Authentication is Google's managed authentication service offering email/password, phone, and 15+ social OAuth providers with native SDKs for iOS, Android, and Web. It integrates directly with Firestore and Cloud Functions security rules, provides anonymous auth for frictionless onboarding, and scales to billions of users at no per-auth cost.

assets.name: Kinde
assets.description: Kinde is a modern authentication and user management platform focused on developer experience, offering SSO, MFA, social login, and feature flags through a clean SDK and management UI. It provides generous free tier limits and is designed for early-stage startups and growing SaaS products that want enterprise-ready auth without the complexity.

assets.name: Stytch
assets.description: Stytch is a passwordless-first authentication platform providing magic links, passkeys, biometrics, WebAuthn, and B2B organization management through developer-friendly APIs and pre-built UI components. Its flexible SDKs support both frontend and backend-only flows, and its B2B product includes full SAML SSO and SCIM provisioning.

assets.name: Logto
assets.description: Logto is an open-source auth infrastructure platform providing OIDC-based identity with multi-tenancy, organization support, and an extensive connector library for social and enterprise providers. It can be self-hosted on any infrastructure or used as a cloud service, giving teams full control over their user data.

assets.name: Lucia
assets.description: Lucia is a lightweight, open-source TypeScript auth library that handles session management and user state without prescribing a specific database or framework. It provides the low-level building blocks for custom authentication implementations, giving developers full control while eliminating the complexity of session security fundamentals.

assets.name: Descope
assets.description: Descope is a no-code and SDK-based authentication platform that enables building complex auth flows visually through a drag-and-drop flow builder while also supporting full API and SDK access. It covers passwordless, MFA, SSO, and B2B use cases and includes built-in risk-based authentication and bot detection.

assets.name: Supabase
assets.description: Supabase is an open-source Firebase alternative built on PostgreSQL, providing a managed database with a real-time subscription engine, auto-generated REST and GraphQL APIs, row-level security, edge functions, and vector support via pgvector. Its generous free tier and instant API generation make it the default database choice for AI-stack startups.

assets.name: Neon
assets.description: Neon is a serverless PostgreSQL platform that separates storage from compute, enabling instant database branching, scale-to-zero cold start, and point-in-time restore. Its branching feature is particularly valued in AI and development workflows for creating isolated per-PR database environments without duplicating storage.

assets.name: PlanetScale
assets.description: PlanetScale is a MySQL-compatible serverless database platform built on Vitess (the technology behind YouTube's database infrastructure) that provides horizontal sharding, non-blocking schema changes, and database branching. Its branching workflow allows safe schema migrations without downtime through a PR-like review process.

assets.name: Turso
assets.description: Turso is a distributed SQLite database platform built on libSQL (an open-source SQLite fork) that replicates databases to edge locations worldwide for ultra-low-latency reads. It is designed for multi-tenant applications, supporting thousands of isolated per-tenant databases at minimal cost, making it ideal for AI SaaS products.

assets.name: Xata
assets.description: Xata is a serverless database platform combining PostgreSQL with built-in full-text search, file attachments, and a spreadsheet-like UI for data management. It provides a typed TypeScript SDK, automatic schema migrations, and branch-based workflows that align with modern frontend deployment pipelines.

assets.name: Convex
assets.description: Convex is a reactive backend-as-a-service that combines a document database, server functions, real-time subscriptions, file storage, and scheduled jobs in a single TypeScript-native platform. Its fully consistent, ACID-compliant database with end-to-end reactivity eliminates the need for separate state management layers in real-time applications.

assets.name: CockroachDB
assets.description: CockroachDB is a cloud-native, distributed SQL database engineered for global scale and zero-downtime survivability. Its PostgreSQL-compatible wire protocol, automatic sharding, multi-region replication, and serializable isolation make it the database of choice for applications that require global distribution with strong consistency guarantees.

assets.name: Upstash
assets.description: Upstash is a serverless data platform providing per-request-priced Redis and Kafka as well as a vector database and QStash messaging queue. Its HTTP-based clients work in serverless and edge environments where persistent TCP connections are unavailable, making it the standard choice for caching and rate-limiting in Next.js edge deployments.

assets.name: MongoDB Atlas
assets.description: MongoDB Atlas is a fully managed multi-cloud database platform for MongoDB that provides vector search, full-text search, time-series collections, Atlas Stream Processing, and global multi-region clusters. Its Atlas Vector Search integrates natively with LangChain and other RAG frameworks, making it widely used as a combined operational and AI database.

assets.name: Pinecone
assets.description: Pinecone is the leading managed vector database purpose-built for AI applications, offering real-time upserts, filtered similarity search at billion-scale, and serverless auto-scaling. Its deep integrations with LangChain, LlamaIndex, and all major embedding providers make it the default vector store for production RAG systems.

assets.name: Algolia
assets.description: Algolia is a hosted search and discovery API platform delivering sub-10ms full-text and faceted search with typo tolerance, merchandising rules, and AI re-ranking. It is the dominant search-as-a-service provider for e-commerce and content-heavy platforms, with comprehensive SDKs for every major language and pre-built UI component libraries.

assets.name: Typesense
assets.description: Typesense is an open-source, typo-tolerant search engine designed as a faster and simpler self-hosted alternative to Algolia and Elasticsearch. Written in C++, it delivers millisecond search responses, supports vector search for semantic queries, and provides a cloud-hosted version (Typesense Cloud) for teams that prefer managed infrastructure.

assets.name: Meilisearch
assets.description: Meilisearch is an open-source, lightning-fast search engine written in Rust that prioritizes developer experience with a simple REST API, instant search-as-you-type, and minimal configuration. It supports faceting, filtering, geosearch, and hybrid vector + full-text search, and is available both self-hosted and as Meilisearch Cloud.

assets.name: Elasticsearch
assets.description: Elasticsearch is the world's most widely deployed search and analytics engine, part of the Elastic Stack. It provides distributed full-text search, structured queries, aggregations, vector search (kNN), and real-time analytics at petabyte scale. The Elastic Cloud managed service brings its power to teams without infrastructure overhead.

assets.name: Exa
assets.description: Exa is a web search API designed for AI agents that performs semantic and keyword search across the internet and returns full cleaned page content rather than just URLs. Its embeddings-based index enables concept-level retrieval, and its clean content extraction is purpose-built for feeding LLMs in RAG and research agent workflows.

assets.name: Tavily
assets.description: Tavily is a search API purpose-built for AI agents and LLM applications that aggregates results from multiple search engines and returns LLM-optimized, factually grounded responses. It provides both a search and an extract API with configurable depth settings, and is the default search tool used by LangGraph and many agent frameworks.

assets.name: Perplexity Sonar API
assets.description: Perplexity Sonar API provides programmatic access to Perplexity's real-time web-grounded LLM responses, returning answers with inline citations sourced from live internet search. It is designed for applications that need up-to-date factual answers with attribution rather than raw search results, replacing traditional search APIs in AI pipelines.

assets.name: Brave Search API
assets.description: Brave Search API provides access to Brave's independent search index (not a Google/Bing reseller) with web, news, image, and video search endpoints. Its privacy-first architecture, competitive pricing, and own crawl index make it a popular choice for AI applications that need affordable, independent web search without dependency on Big Tech indexes.

assets.name: Orama
assets.description: Orama is an open-source, full-text and vector search engine that runs entirely in JavaScript/TypeScript — in-browser, on Node.js, or on Cloudflare Workers — with no external dependencies. Its unified hybrid search supports embeddings natively, making it ideal for client-side search experiences and edge-deployed AI retrieval applications.

assets.name: Vespa
assets.description: Vespa is Yahoo's open-source big data serving engine that combines full-text search, structured data lookup, machine-learned ranking, and vector search in a single horizontally scalable platform. Its production-hardened architecture handles billions of documents with real-time updates, making it the choice for large-scale AI search applications.

assets.name: Vercel
assets.description: Vercel is the leading frontend cloud platform offering zero-configuration deployment for Next.js and any modern JavaScript framework with automatic preview deployments per branch, global edge CDN, serverless and edge function runtimes, and an integrated AI SDK. Its developer experience and tight Next.js integration make it the default deployment target for the AI web stack.

assets.name: Cloudflare Workers
assets.description: Cloudflare Workers is a globally distributed serverless compute platform that runs JavaScript, TypeScript, Rust (via WASM), and Python on Cloudflare's edge network at 300+ locations worldwide with sub-millisecond cold starts. Its integrated ecosystem (R2, KV, D1, Queues, AI Gateway) makes it a comprehensive edge runtime for AI-powered applications.

assets.name: Netlify
assets.description: Netlify is a web development cloud platform offering continuous deployment from Git, global CDN, serverless functions, form handling, and edge middleware for static and server-rendered sites. It pioneered the Jamstack deployment model and provides a rich ecosystem of plugins and integrations for build optimization and content workflows.

assets.name: Railway
assets.description: Railway is a modern infrastructure platform that lets developers deploy any language, framework, or database with minimal configuration. It provisions full Linux environments with persistent volumes, private networking, and automatic HTTPS, positioned as the successor to Heroku for teams wanting PaaS simplicity with more control.

assets.name: Fly.io
assets.description: Fly.io is a platform for running full-stack applications and databases close to users by converting Docker containers into Firecracker micro-VMs deployed across 30+ regions. It supports stateful workloads via persistent volumes and Fly Postgres, long-running processes, WebSockets, and gRPC — making it suitable for hosting AI inference servers and backends.

assets.name: Render
assets.description: Render is a unified cloud platform for deploying web services, static sites, background workers, cron jobs, and managed PostgreSQL databases with automatic TLS, Git-based deploys, and private networking between services. Its zero-DevOps approach and predictable pricing make it popular for full-stack AI applications moving beyond hobby tiers.

assets.name: Cloudflare Pages
assets.description: Cloudflare Pages is a Jamstack deployment platform with unlimited bandwidth, preview deployments, and native integration with Cloudflare Workers for full-stack server-side rendering. Its zero-config deploy pipeline, global CDN distribution, and seamless access to Cloudflare's R2, KV, and AI products make it a compelling all-in-one edge platform.

assets.name: AWS App Runner
assets.description: AWS App Runner is a fully managed service for deploying containerized web applications and APIs at scale without managing infrastructure. It automatically handles load balancing, auto-scaling from zero, TLS termination, and CI/CD from GitHub or ECR, providing a Heroku-like experience within the AWS ecosystem for teams already invested in AWS.

assets.name: DigitalOcean App Platform
assets.description: DigitalOcean App Platform is a fully managed PaaS that automatically builds and deploys applications from GitHub repositories, supporting Node.js, Python, Go, Ruby, PHP, and static sites. It provides managed databases, private networking, horizontal scaling, and predictable pricing without the complexity of full cloud providers.

assets.name: SST
assets.description: SST (Serverless Stack) is an open-source infrastructure-as-code framework for deploying full-stack TypeScript applications to AWS with a unified component model covering Lambda, containers, databases, storage, and queues. Its Live Lambda Development feature provides instant local changes reflected on real AWS infrastructure without redeploying.

assets.name: GitHub Actions
assets.description: GitHub Actions is the dominant CI/CD platform integrated directly into GitHub repositories, offering event-driven workflows triggered by pushes, PRs, issues, and schedules. Its 20,000+ community actions in the Marketplace, matrix builds, reusable workflows, and generous free tier minutes make it the default CI choice for open-source and private projects alike.

assets.name: GitLab CI
assets.description: GitLab CI/CD is GitLab's built-in continuous integration and delivery system that uses a YAML pipeline definition committed to the repository. It provides parent-child pipelines, merge train support, security scanning, dependency scanning, and compliance frameworks as part of GitLab's integrated DevSecOps platform.

assets.name: CircleCI
assets.description: CircleCI is a mature, cloud-native CI/CD platform known for high parallelism, optimized caching strategies, and a powerful orb ecosystem for reusable configuration. It supports Docker, machine, and macOS executors with self-hosted runner options, and provides advanced resource class selection for cost-optimized pipeline execution.

assets.name: Dagger
assets.description: Dagger is an open-source programmable CI/CD engine that lets developers write pipeline logic in TypeScript, Python, or Go using the Dagger SDK, running the same pipeline locally and on any CI platform. Its containerized execution model with intelligent caching eliminates environment drift between local dev and CI.

assets.name: Earthly
assets.description: Earthly is an open-source build automation tool that combines Dockerfile and Makefile syntax into a reproducible, containerized build system that runs identically locally and in any CI environment. Its parallel execution engine and intelligent layer caching significantly reduce build times for monorepos and complex dependency graphs.

assets.name: Jenkins
assets.description: Jenkins is the world's most widely deployed open-source automation server, with over 1,800 plugins covering every aspect of the software delivery pipeline. Its self-hosted architecture gives organizations complete control over infrastructure, credentials, and build environments — making it the entrenched standard in enterprise on-premise CI/CD.

assets.name: Buildkite
assets.description: Buildkite is a hybrid CI/CD platform that runs pipeline orchestration in the cloud while executing builds on self-hosted agents, enabling data sovereignty for security-sensitive environments while maintaining a modern SaaS experience. Its elastic agent scaling on AWS, GCP, or bare metal handles the largest enterprise monorepo workloads.

assets.name: Depot
assets.description: Depot is a remote Docker build acceleration service that provides shared, persistent build caches and high-performance builder machines (ARM and x86) to dramatically speed up Docker image builds in CI. It integrates with GitHub Actions, CircleCI, and any CI platform as a drop-in docker buildx replacement, often delivering 10x faster builds.

assets.name: Nx Cloud
assets.description: Nx Cloud is the distributed task execution and remote caching layer for Nx monorepos that enables teams to share build, test, and lint caches across CI machines and local developer environments. Its affected command intelligence and task pipeline parallelization reduce CI times in large TypeScript/JavaScript monorepos by up to 90%.

assets.name: Spacelift
assets.description: Spacelift is a flexible infrastructure delivery platform for Terraform, OpenTofu, Pulumi, Ansible, and Kubernetes that adds policy-as-code, drift detection, PR-based workflows, and a stack dependency graph to infrastructure-as-code pipelines. It replaces fragile Terraform Cloud or custom CI scripts with a purpose-built IaC delivery system.

assets.name: Datadog
assets.description: Datadog is the leading cloud monitoring and security platform providing unified observability across infrastructure metrics, distributed traces, logs, and synthetic tests. Its 700+ integrations, AI-powered anomaly detection, LLM Observability product for AI applications, and comprehensive alerting make it the enterprise standard for production monitoring.

assets.name: Grafana Stack
assets.description: The Grafana Stack is the open-source observability standard comprising Grafana (dashboards), Loki (logs), Tempo (traces), Mimir (metrics), and the Grafana Agent for data collection. Grafana Cloud provides this entire stack as a managed service with a generous free tier, making it the most popular self-hosted and cloud-hybrid observability solution.

assets.name: PostHog
assets.description: PostHog is an open-source product analytics platform that combines event tracking, session recording, feature flags, A/B testing, and user surveys in a single self-hostable tool. Its all-in-one approach eliminates the need for multiple analytics vendors, and its generous cloud free tier with no sampling makes it the go-to for AI startup product analytics.

assets.name: Sentry
assets.description: Sentry is the industry-standard application error monitoring and performance tracking platform, providing real-time crash reporting with full stack traces, breadcrumbs, and contextual user data across 100+ platforms and frameworks. Its AI-powered issue grouping, release tracking, and code ownership features make it essential for production debugging.

assets.name: Axiom
assets.description: Axiom is a log management and analytics platform purpose-built for cloud-native workloads, offering limitless ingest at a fraction of Datadog's cost by decoupling storage from query compute. Its powerful APL query language, OpenTelemetry support, and Vercel integration make it the preferred logging solution for serverless and edge applications.

assets.name: Better Stack
assets.description: Better Stack is an all-in-one observability and incident management platform combining uptime monitoring, beautiful status pages, structured log management (Logtail), and on-call alerting. Its clean UI, competitive pricing, and tight GitHub integration make it popular with development teams seeking a consolidated alternative to multiple specialized tools.

assets.name: New Relic
assets.description: New Relic is a full-stack observability platform covering APM, infrastructure monitoring, browser/mobile monitoring, synthetic testing, and log management with AI-powered insights through New Relic AI. Its unified data platform and 500GB/month free tier with 1 full-access user make it accessible for teams scaling from startup to enterprise.

assets.name: Highlight.io
assets.description: Highlight.io is an open-source full-stack monitoring platform combining session replay, error monitoring, and structured logging in a single self-hostable or cloud product. Its pixel-perfect session replays correlated with backend errors and logs provide the complete context needed to reproduce and fix issues reported by users.

assets.name: SigNoz
assets.description: SigNoz is an open-source, OpenTelemetry-native APM and observability platform providing metrics, traces, and logs in a single self-hosted application backed by ClickHouse for high-throughput analytics. It is positioned as the open-source alternative to Datadog and New Relic for teams requiring data sovereignty and cost control.

assets.name: Baselime
assets.description: Baselime is a serverless-native observability platform acquired by Cloudflare that provides OpenTelemetry-based distributed tracing, structured logs, and AI-powered query assistance tailored for Lambda and edge function workloads. Its automatic instrumentation and natural language querying reduce the time to insight for serverless developers.

assets.name: Stripe
assets.description: Stripe is the world's leading payment infrastructure platform providing APIs for accepting payments, managing subscriptions, issuing cards, and handling complex billing scenarios across 135+ currencies and 50+ payment methods. Its developer-first design, comprehensive documentation, and products like Stripe Billing and Stripe Connect cover the full revenue lifecycle.

assets.name: Paddle
assets.description: Paddle is a merchant of record (MoR) platform for SaaS companies that handles global payment processing, sales tax and VAT collection, compliance, and subscription management as the legal seller. This shifts tax liability and compliance complexity away from the software company, making it popular for bootstrapped SaaS products selling globally.

assets.name: LemonSqueezy
assets.description: LemonSqueezy is a merchant of record platform for indie developers and SaaS founders that handles global payments, subscription management, license keys, and tax compliance through a simple API and no-code checkout experience. Acquired by Stripe, it is the go-to payment solution for solo founders and small teams launching digital products.

assets.name: Orb
assets.description: Orb is a usage-based billing platform purpose-built for AI and developer tools companies that need flexible metering, complex pricing models (per-token, per-seat, hybrid), and accurate revenue recognition. Its event-ingestion pipeline handles millions of usage events per second, enabling real-time billing for any consumption-based pricing model.

assets.name: Metronome
assets.description: Metronome is a usage-based billing infrastructure platform used by companies like OpenAI and Databricks to meter, price, and invoice complex cloud and AI products. It ingests raw usage events, applies configurable pricing logic in real time, and handles contract management and revenue reporting at enterprise scale.

assets.name: Chargebee
assets.description: Chargebee is a subscription management and revenue operations platform that handles recurring billing, dunning, revenue recognition (ASC 606), and SaaS metrics reporting. It integrates with Stripe, Braintree, and other payment gateways, and its Retention and RevRec modules make it the full revenue stack for scaling subscription businesses.

assets.name: Lago
assets.description: Lago is an open-source metering and usage-based billing API that provides precise event-based billing, subscription management, and invoicing as a self-hostable alternative to enterprise billing platforms. Its transparent open-source model and developer-friendly API make it popular with companies wanting full control over their billing infrastructure.

assets.name: Dodo Payments
assets.description: Dodo Payments is a global merchant of record platform designed for AI startups and digital product companies, providing payment processing, VAT/GST compliance, and subscription management with a focus on emerging markets and developer simplicity. Its competitive MoR rates and straightforward API make it an accessible alternative to Paddle for global SaaS products.

assets.name: Polar
assets.description: Polar is an open-source monetization platform for developers and open-source maintainers, offering one-time purchases, subscriptions, and GitHub-integrated issue funding and sponsorships. Its MoR model handles tax compliance while its GitHub integration lets maintainers monetize their work directly within developer workflows.

assets.name: Recurly
assets.description: Recurly is an enterprise subscription management platform that handles complex billing scenarios including tiered pricing, promotional offers, dunning management, and multi-currency support for high-volume subscription businesses. Its Revenue Optimization Engine uses AI to reduce involuntary churn through intelligent payment retry logic.

assets.name: Resend
assets.description: Resend is a modern email API for developers that provides high deliverability transactional email with a clean REST API, React Email support for building templates with components, real-time webhooks, and a dashboard with delivery analytics. Its developer-first design and React Email integration make it the default email service for the modern web stack.

assets.name: Postmark
assets.description: Postmark is a high-deliverability transactional email service that specializes in reliable, fast delivery of triggered emails such as password resets, receipts, and notifications. Its message streams separate transactional and broadcast email traffic on dedicated IP pools, and its detailed delivery analytics and inbox previews are best-in-class.

assets.name: SendGrid
assets.description: SendGrid is Twilio's email platform providing both transactional email APIs and marketing campaign tools with industry-leading throughput of billions of emails per month. Its Email Validation API, dedicated IP management, and comprehensive deliverability tools make it the enterprise standard for high-volume email delivery.

assets.name: Amazon SES
assets.description: Amazon Simple Email Service is AWS's cloud-based email sending and receiving service offering the lowest cost-per-email in the industry at $0.10 per 1,000 emails. It provides dedicated IPs, configuration sets for tracking, SMTP and API access, and seamless integration with other AWS services for high-volume transactional and marketing email.

assets.name: Knock
assets.description: Knock is a multi-channel notification infrastructure platform that provides a workflow engine for orchestrating notifications across email, in-app, SMS, push, and Slack from a single API. Its visual workflow builder, preference management, and per-user notification controls make it the standard for complex, user-centric notification systems.

assets.name: Novu
assets.description: Novu is an open-source notification infrastructure platform providing a unified API for email, SMS, push, in-app, chat, and webhook notifications with a workflow editor, subscriber preference management, and provider routing. Its open-source nature and self-hosting option give teams full control over their notification data and infrastructure.

assets.name: Twilio
assets.description: Twilio is the leading cloud communications platform providing APIs for SMS, voice, video, WhatsApp, email (via SendGrid), and verified identity services. Its Programmable Messaging API, Studio visual builder, and Conversations platform enable businesses to build any communications flow across every channel their customers use.

assets.name: Courier
assets.description: Courier is a notification delivery API that routes messages across email, SMS, push, and chat (Slack, Teams, Discord) with a visual template studio and intelligent provider failover. Its routing engine selects the optimal notification channel based on user preferences and delivery rates, optimizing engagement across all touchpoints.

assets.name: Plivo
assets.description: Plivo is a global cloud communications platform providing SMS, voice, and WhatsApp APIs with a direct carrier network spanning 190+ countries. Its competitive international pricing, high-throughput SMS delivery, and carrier-grade voice infrastructure make it a popular Twilio alternative for cost-sensitive high-volume messaging applications.

assets.name: Loops
assets.description: Loops is a modern email platform built specifically for SaaS companies, combining transactional email APIs with marketing campaign management in a developer-friendly interface. Its contacts model, event-triggered automation, and clean React Email support make it the opinionated choice for product-led SaaS teams wanting a unified email platform.

assets.name: Cloudflare R2
assets.description: Cloudflare R2 is an S3-compatible object storage service with zero egress fees, making it dramatically cheaper than AWS S3 for read-heavy workloads. It integrates natively with Cloudflare Workers, Pages, and the CDN, and supports public bucket URLs, custom domains, and event notifications — ideal for AI application asset storage.

assets.name: AWS S3
assets.description: Amazon S3 is the world's most widely used object storage service, offering 99.999999999% durability, multiple storage classes from Standard to Glacier, fine-grained access controls, and deep integration with the entire AWS ecosystem. Its S3-compatible API has become the industry standard interface adopted by virtually every alternative object storage provider.

assets.name: Vercel Blob
assets.description: Vercel Blob is a globally distributed file storage service tightly integrated into the Vercel platform, providing simple SDK-based upload, download, and management of files with automatic CDN delivery. Its zero-configuration setup and direct integration with Next.js server actions and API routes make it the path-of-least-resistance storage solution for Vercel-hosted applications.

assets.name: UploadThing
assets.description: UploadThing is an open-source file upload solution for TypeScript full-stack applications that provides type-safe file upload routes, server-side validation, and built-in CDN delivery. Its end-to-end type safety from upload definition to frontend component and seamless Next.js integration make it the developer favorite for building file upload features.

assets.name: Cloudinary
assets.description: Cloudinary is a media management and optimization platform that provides cloud storage, on-the-fly image and video transformation via URL parameters, AI-powered media analysis, and global CDN delivery. Its generative fill, background removal, and automatic format/quality optimization features make it the standard for media-heavy applications.

assets.name: Imgix
assets.description: Imgix is a real-time image processing and optimization CDN that transforms, optimizes, and delivers images at any scale via URL-based parameters. It works with any origin storage (S3, GCS, custom servers), supports responsive images with automatic format detection (AVIF, WebP), and provides a rendering API with 100+ transformation operations.

assets.name: Bunny CDN
assets.description: Bunny CDN is a high-performance, cost-effective content delivery network with 114+ PoPs worldwide, offering CDN, edge storage (BunnyStorage), stream video hosting, DNS, and image optimization in one platform. Its transparent pricing, no minimum commitments, and superior performance-to-cost ratio make it a top Cloudflare CDN alternative.

assets.name: Cloudflare Images
assets.description: Cloudflare Images is a managed image storage and optimization service that stores, resizes, optimizes, and delivers images at scale through Cloudflare's global network. Its fixed $5/month pricing for 100,000 images, automatic WebP and AVIF conversion, and flexible variant system make it a cost-predictable alternative to Cloudinary for image-centric applications.

assets.name: Backblaze B2
assets.description: Backblaze B2 is an S3-compatible cloud object storage service priced at $6/TB/month — one quarter the cost of AWS S3 — with free egress to Cloudflare and Fastly CDN partners. Its S3-compatible API, lifecycle rules, and transparent pricing make it the preferred storage backend for cost-sensitive applications with high storage volume requirements.

assets.name: Tigris
assets.description: Tigris is a globally distributed S3-compatible object storage service built on Fly.io infrastructure that automatically replicates objects to the regions where they are accessed. Its zero-configuration global distribution, S3-compatible API, and no egress fees make it compelling for AI applications that serve users across multiple geographic regions.
